revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Hidden category}} {{Possibly empty category}}
This category contains articles with [[Simplified Chinese language|simplified Chinese-language]] text.
The primary purpose of these categories is to facilitate manual or automated checking of text in other languages.
This category should only be added with the '''{{tlx|zh}}''' template, never explicitly.
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Hidden category}} {{Possibly empty category}}
This category contains articles with [[Simplified Chinese language|simplified Chinese-language]] text.
The primary purpose of these categories is to facilitate manual or automated checking of text in other languages.
This category should only be added with the '''{{tlx|zh}}''' template, never explicitly.
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] [[Category:bump-01-18]]

{{Hidden category}} {{Possibly empty category}}
This category contains articles with [[Simplified Chinese language|simplified Chinese-language]] text.
The primary purpose of these categories is to facilitate manual or automated checking of text in other languages.

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "tab went inactive so I need to add another category" to "qq"
Bot: tidy & size tag (20 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (19 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 19 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Hidden category}} {{Possibly empty category}} This category contains articles with [[:en:Simplified Chinese language|simplified Chinese-language]] text. The primary purpose of these categories is to facilitate manual or automated checking of text in other languages. This category should only be added with the '''{{tlx|zh}}''' template, never explicitly. {{draft categories| }}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:Articles containing simplified Chinese-language text]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Hidden category}}
{{Possibly empty category}}
{{tlx|zh}}
{{wikidata link|Q8266663}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:Articles containing simplified Chinese-language text]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

<!--templates-->
{{Hidden category}}
{{Possibly empty category}}
{{tlx|zh}}
{{wikidata link|Q8266663}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:Articles containing simplified Chinese-language text]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates-->
{{Hidden category}}
{{Possibly empty category}}
{{tlx|zh}}
{{wikidata link|Q8266663}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:Articles containing simplified Chinese-language text]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates-->
{{Hidden category}}
{{Possibly empty category}}
{{tlx|zh}}
{{wikidata link|Q8266663}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:Articles containing simplified Chinese-language text]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:articles with]]
